items.title: Two More Trans Killers Carry Out Atrocities
items.description: There are dots here that should be connected.

items.title: AOC’s Risible Performance
items.description: AOC’s time at the Munich conference was another reminder that no matter how much she is billed as a rising star, she is still callow and unserious.

items.title: America Seeks Partner, Europe Swipes Left
items.description: There is a kind of romantic streak to U.S. relations with Europe in the Trump era.

items.title: Rubio’s Impressive Tightrope Walk
items.description: The secretary of state stayed true to President Trump while reassuring Europe.

items.title: Congress Should Close the Big Hospitals Tax Loophole
items.description: Large nonprofit hospital networks are leveraging huge subsidies for financial gains and political advantage.
